titleStmt.title: SII 11.169: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 169. (B.K. No. 2 of 1928-29.) AIHOḶE, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE TEMPLE CALLED CHARANTIGUḌI.

summary.p: This inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and introduces a certain Kēśavayya-Śeṭṭi, son of Jēmapāryya and Jātiyakka, as a ‘son’ i.e. servant of the Five-Hundred Svāmins of Ayyāvoḷe. It records that Kēśava constructed a hall (paṭṭaśāle), the eastern and western basadis and a well, consecrated the Lōkapāḷas and granted land, house-sites and oil-mills for the worship of the deities.
The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 44, Vikāri, Vaiśākha, śu. 3, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1119, April 14, Monday; ·93.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
matparamagambhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁcchanaṁ jīyā
t traiḷōkyanāthasya sāśanaṁ jinasāśanaṁ [.] svasti sama
stabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmat tribhuvanamalladēvarājyābhyavriddhipravarddhana muttarōttara mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ sa
luttamire tada(ṁ)nvayadattiyappa śrīmanmahāgrahāra vayyāvoḷeyaynūrvva rsvāmigaḷa putraṁ .
dhananikṣēpaṇabījadiṁ dudiyisal lōbhāṁkuraṁ suttugoṁḍu nilal durgguṇakaṁṭakaṁ bahuvrithā�dā*] vāgni
jjanadoṁ dujjagadiṁdē korvva noḷakoḷvo duryyaśōvallīvarddhanavaṁ mārppare maḷalakṣmīdhāmanaṁ jēmanaṁ .
jēmaṁgaṁ bhabyajanaprēmaṁgaṁ nijakuḷābdhivarddhana(ṁ)viḷasatsōmaṁgaṁ kāṁtājanakā maṁgaṁ pāṭiyoḷare bhūmaṁ
ḍaḷadoḷ . ja�kaṁ śrījēmapāryyaṁ guṇagaṇavati tāyjātiyakkaṁ praṇūtaṁ jinanāptaṁ dēvacaṁdra�ti guru sati
sāviyakkaṁ tanūjaṁ janavaṁdyaṁ kalligāṁkaṁ nutaviśadayaśarttaṁde yaynūrvvarīgaḷ tanageṁdaṁdēṁ kritārtthaṁ karevaḍe vasu
cakradoḷ kēśavayyaṁ . nele sārasvatalakṣmigaṁ nritavacaśśrīgaṁ mukhāṁbhōruhaṁ nele lakṣmīsatigaṁ dayāsudatigaṁ vistīrṇnahri
tpaṁkajaṁ nele dānapriyegaṁ jayāpramadegaṁ dōrmmaṁḍaḷaṁ tānenal neleyādaṁ subagiṁga mujvaḷayaśaśśrīkāṁtegaṁ kēśava[ṁ .]
manucāritrado ḷārppinoḷ suramahījaṁ śaucadoḷ vāyunandana natyunnatiyoḷ himāvanidharēṁdraṁ rūpinoḷ na
krakētana niṁdrējya natipprakāśamatiyoḷ bāppeṁdu baṇnippu doldu nitāṁta biḍadī dharitri vinayāṁbhōrāśiyaṁ kēsiyaṁ .
hridayaṁ niśkapaṭaṁ diṭaṁ nuḍi vicāraṁ dharmmaśāstrakke māḍide ṭīkā yamakhaṁḍitaṁ nuta guṇaṁ ratnatrayaṁ sāhasaṁ sada
vikramalakṣmigā rppakhiḷadīnānāthasaṁtarppaṇāspada veṁdaṁde teraḷcanē budhara hritsaṁklēśavaṁ kēśavaṁ [.] śrīśaṁ vibudhajanārttivi
nāśaṁ duritapradūra naṁtadaṟiṁdī kēśavaneraḍillādiya kēśavanalladoḍe pempu peṟarginitoḷeve . tattaneyaṁ . Ātaṁ sa
mastabhuvanakhyātaṁ nirupamajinēṁdrapadayugapūjāprītaṁ nikhiḷakaḷāsaṁkhyātaṁ sajjanavinūta nī kalidēvaṁ . ©
Intenisi negaḷda śrīmat kēśavayyaseṭṭiyaru . © svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 44 neya vikāri saṁvacharada vai
śākha suddha tadige sōmavāradaṁdu Abbe jātikayvegaḷige maravesada paṭṭaśāleyumaṁ . svasti sāviyakka
ge mūḍaṇa basadiyu mā tavageṁdu māḍisida paḍuvaṇa basadiyumaṁ bāviyuma nalliya lōkapāḷarumaṁ
tadīya śubhadinadoḷ pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi dēvaraṁgabhōgakkendu tōraṇadiṁ baḍagaṇa bīdi yiṁ paḍuvaṇa mūḍavāgila
ṁgaḍibasadiyiṁ paḍuvaloṁdu mana poṟagāgiĀ basadiyiṁ mūḍalu bhūmiSix or seven letters were originally engraved after this
sahitaṁ gāṇa Ā gāṇaṁgaḷiṁ mūḍaṇa taṁkavāgila mane Oṁdu Ā maneyiṁ dāgnē yade baḍagavāgila mane Oṁdu
kaṁḍike Eraḍu sthaḷada keyi mattareṁṭu cuṁcigeyi mattaru nālku basadiya muṁdaṇa teṁkavāgila mane Oṁdu .
Digital edition of SII 11.169 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
